title: Crossfilter Heatmap: 2D Cross-Tab that Re-Aggregates (chart.link)

div.span: Click a slice or bar to re-aggregate the heatmap

div.div: The heatmap is a 2D cross-tab: its chart.link.dimension returns [day, quarter], so the engine aggregates a day-by-quarter matrix of trade counts. Clicking the outcome donut or the day bar re-aggregates the heatmap over just the matching trades and it recolors in place. (Phase A: the heatmap is a re-aggregating target; clicking a heatmap cell to filter is a later phase.) Reset clears everything.

chart.options: chart: { id: 'byDayQuarter', type: 'heatmap', height: 300, fontFamily: 'Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif', animations: { speed: 450 }, link: { id: 'trades', dimension: function (r) { return [r.day, r.quarter] }, reduce: 'count', }, }, title: { text: 'Trades by day x quarter', align: 'left' }, dataLabels: { enabled: true }, plotOptions: { heatmap: { radius: 3, enableShades: true, shadeIntensity: 0.6 } }, colors: ['#6366f1'],

chart: { id: 'byOutcome', type: 'donut', height: 250, fontFamily: 'Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif', animations: { speed: 450 }, link: { id: 'trades', dimension: function (r) { return r.outcome }, reduce: 'count', dimOpacity: 0.18 }, }, title: { text: 'Outcome', align: 'left' }, legend: { position: 'bottom', fontSize: '12px' }, plotOptions: { pie: { expandOnClick: false } }, dataLabels: { enabled: true, formatter: function (v, o) { return o.w.config.series[o.seriesIndex] } }, // Records are first-seen ordered, and the data emits 'Loss' first, so the // domain is [Loss, Gain]: red for Loss, green for Gain. colors: ['#ef4444', '#22c55e'],

chart: { id: 'byDay', type: 'bar', height: 250, fontFamily: 'Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif', animations: { speed: 450 }, link: { id: 'trades', dimension: function (r) { return r.day }, reduce: 'count', seriesName: 'Trades', dimOpacity: 0.18 }, }, title: { text: 'Day of week', align: 'left' }, plotOptions: { bar: { columnWidth: '55%', borderRadius: 3, distributed: true } }, legend: { show: false }, dataLabels: { enabled: false }, colors: ['#6366f1', '#0ea5e9', '#22c55e', '#f59e0b', '#a855f7'],
